todayStoryline.headline: Teams take day off for recovery
todayStoryline.subtitle: Squads focus on light training, medical recovery and travel before next fixtures.

news.headline: Andy Burnham to be made UK Labour leader on way to becoming prime minister
news.body: Andy Burnham is set to be declared leader of Britain’s governing Labour Party, clearing the path to become prime minister. The move follows broad support within Labour and positions him to take office ahead of the next general election.

footerNote: All times converted from official kickoffs
